title: eupatorium heteroneurum
intro: Eupatorium heteroneurum, also known as White Snakeroot or Ague Weed, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the sunflower family. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone compounds. The health benefits of Eupatorium heteroneurum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Eupatorium heteroneurum can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
